programme.title: The Upside Down Tree
programme.desc: The African Baobab is one of the largest living things in the world, an icon of the African landscape, instantly recognisable, mysterious and intriguing. It is the world's biggest flowering plant and the largest succulent plant on earth.

programme.title: Finding Little Italy
programme.desc: The word Tuscany conjures images and ideas that no-one can deny. From the wines of Chianti to the great artistic cities of Florence and Siena, Tuscany is the most Italian of regions.

programme.title: Wonders Of...: Slovenia - Western
programme.desc: Ashley explores the two most famous in Eastern Europe, the goes to explore the rich minerals of the salt fields, flies over the Adriatic, and sails along Slovenia’s coastline through Piran and Koper.

programme.title: Across the Pacific with Te Radar
programme.desc: Radar explores a little-seen side to Fiji when he journeys into the remote highlands to visit the village where the last white man was eaten.

programme.title: Peace Parks
programme.desc: In this series we follow the trail of the Transfrontier Parks bordering on South Africa and extending into neighbouring countries. We explore why these conservation areas are important and what they protect.

programme.title: Across The World With Te Radar
programme.desc: Are there plenty more fish in the sea? Global Radar tries a day of low impact fishing and then heads to the small island nation of Tonga to see how looking back will help them look forward to a more plentiful catch.

programme.title: The Cheetah Diaries
programme.desc: This time on the Cheetah Diaries we join an excited Emily as she travels to collect four new cheetah ambassador hopefuls. We witness the end of an era as Angel and Melda retire from the Anatolian breeding dog programme.

programme.title: Frontier Vets
programme.desc: Dr. Greg sets up a darting competition – the winner gets to dart a zebra on an upcoming case. Delarey, the hunter, is shocked when Roxanne, hits a bulls eye! Can he do the same?

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI ENCOUNTERS
programme.desc: Wildlife guide, Craig accompanies Kristina to one of the wildest places in Zimbabwe – Chitake Springs, aka, Ambush Alley. They get up close to a huge bull elephant and Kristina has her first- ever sighting of endangered wild dogs.

programme.title: Sharks, Scavengers of the Seas
programme.desc: Before being an earthly paradise with enchanting colours, the lagoon of New Caledonia is above all a paradise for sharks. But not just any sharks: they are used to being considered as fearsome predators, they are essentially opportunistic scavengers.

programme.title: Nigel Marven's Cruise Ship Adventures
programme.desc: Embarking on a once in a lifetime cruise around the picturesque Caribbean, Nigel encounters the wildlife of the tropics.

programme.title: THE BEST OF WORLDS: LIFE AT ITS ALPINE LIMITS
programme.desc: For 5000 years man has sought to inhabit the more accessible areas of Europe, but at its very heart, in the high zones of the Alps, there exists a world parallel to ours.

programme.title: EPIC SAFARI ENCOUNTERS
programme.desc: Wildlife guide, Craig accompanies Kristina to one of the wildest places in Zimbabwe – Chitake Springs, aka, Ambush Alley. They get up close to a huge bull elephant and Kristina has her first- ever sighting of endangered wild dogs.

programme.title: The Living Sea
programme.desc: From the tropical waters of Palau in the South Pacific, to the barreling waves of Oahu's North Shore and Nova Scotia's major tidal swings, The Living Sea celebrates the beauty, power and importance of the ocean.

programme.title: Top Dive Sites
programme.desc: Raja Ampat

programme.title: Wildest latin america
programme.desc: Patagonia is the southernmost part of South America. It's a place of extremes – of vast ice fields and snow-capped mountains; of windswept deserts and violent oceans.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Indonesia
programme.desc: The western Indonesian islands of Borneo and Sumatra are home to some of the richest rainforests on earth, and their residents are amongst the most rare in the world.

programme.title: 1-800-Missing
programme.desc: Jess and Nicole investigate when a busload of people goes missing during a casino tour; the bus disappears on its way from Philadelphia to Atlantic City.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Tensions flare at Dondre and Janelle's over-the-top party; Johnny forces Tal to face the truth about who he is.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Poppy and Janelle open up to one another; Rigo and Dondre grapple with the events of the party.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Rigo goes viral; King makes a big reveal to Poppy.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Sage Odom's tour auditions get underway; Uncle Al tries to save the twins; Collette and East-O's turbulent past comes to a head.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: Realizing what it takes to become professional dance squad; Rigo has questions after Eart-o's death.

programme.title: Step Up: High Water
programme.desc: The rivalry between Tal and Zo comes to a head; Davis meets Odalie's parents.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Kevin and Charity begin divorce proceedings, but the circumstances are exacerbated when Lady Mae learns the truth about Kevin; Grace and Darius's relationship reaches a stalemate.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: The anniversary of Faith's death is at hand and Grace shows no sign of giving up her pursuit of Mac; Triumph Pastor Basie Skanks and Jacob receive bad news regarding Triumph Two's finances.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Jacob makes Basie an offer to clear his debt and gain full control of Triumph II; Mac receives bad news from Skip Leonard, which puts him an explosive collision course with Grace.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Grace and Mac's showdown sends shockwaves through the family; Jacob offers the Bishop an olive branch; Kevin makes a decision that leaves Charity reeling.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: Jacob and Kerissa establish their new ministry; Charity desperately tries to reach Kevin; Darius gets an offer that may take him out of Memphis, leaving Grace to wonder where she fits in his life.

programme.title: Greenleaf
programme.desc: When Sophia and Zora are excluded from the upcoming debutante Cotillion, Lady Mae sets out to make things right; Grace is inspired by Basie's sermon; Charity reaches out to Carlton.

programme.title: Power
programme.desc: Ghost and Tasha attempt to calm Tommy after Holly meets with the feds and disappears; Ghost explains his actions to Angela.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, 54-year-old Gayle Isleib was ambushed in her Manchester, Connecticut driveway and shot to death. Police had to determine whether obsessive love was the motive for her murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the body of a young woman is found under an isolated highway ramp, a unique fiber on the victim's clothing leads San Diego police straight to the most unlikely of killers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1997, Kelly Eckart's car was found, with her belongings still in it, after she worked a late shift in Franklin, Indiana. Days later, her body was found in an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young couple decided to celebrate their first wedding anniversary with a camping trip to Mount Hood. During the trip, the husband was shot and killed. Later, his wife told two different versions of the events which led to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In a 1992 murder case, the autopsy of a cremated body turns up telltale clues of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 19-year-old woman was found dead in her car; the scene had been staged to make murder appear to be suicide. During their investigation, police discovered the victim was involved in a love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1984, a passerby finds the torso of a woman in a cardboard box. A forensic entomologist analyzes nearby insect activity to determine when the victim was killed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2008, college co-ed Jenna Verhaalen was found dead in her Bryan, Texas apartment. Petechial hemorrhages in her eyes indicated that she was strangled.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After shooting his victims in the head, the killer staged the scene, placed the incriminating evidence into a plastic bag and tossed it into the river.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A Colorado hunter is the victim of a well-planned crime. Investigators suspect two weapons and two killers. But forensic evidence points them in a different direction — one much closer to home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, when a fundamentalist group begins robbing banks near Spokane, authorities know immediately that they are dealing with experienced criminals.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Firefighters find an entire family dead inside their home in an apparent murder-suicide, but there are several inconsistent clues in the rubble. Could ballistics, a time card and some secret audiotapes unravel the mystery?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, Judy Southern arrived home from work and was shot by a gunman waiting within. Her husband arrived shortly afterwards, called emergency services and drove her to the hospital.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On May 20, 2001, Carrie Nelson was beaten to death while working alone in a park office. The case went unsolved for six years. Finally, police found a match with DNA samples gathered from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman who was known to have suffered from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police that, a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her there would be a note in the china cabinet.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A security guard disappeared from his post without a trace; his remains were found a year later in a remote campsite.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The driver said he couldn't have hit and killed a pedestrian on a Harrisburg street. The Jeep Grand Cherokee he was leasing around that time had been sold months ago to a buyer in another state.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two suspects are linked to a murder by bloodstained boots and a gun, but the owner of the items says he has never met the victim. Investigators hope manufacturing codes from beer bottles will determine who is telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was the single most deadly automobile accident in American history. Almost a hundred vehicles were involved, twelve people died and more than fifty people were injured. And it happened along a stretch of highway long known for dense, thick fog.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a Philadelphia Convention, 180 Legionnaires contract pneumonia-like symptoms and 29 of them die. The determination of one scientist helps identify the cause of this deadly disease.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial rapist is on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim was a self-made man who never minced words. Perhaps he was murdered by a disgruntled client or employee. Perhaps the racy photos in his safe held the clue to solving the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called about a dead body, a background check on the victim leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks — all fronted by elderly couple Ray and Faye Copeland.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial arsonist starts several fires that cause millions of dollars worth of damage and the deaths of three people. He is discovered, partly through the use of forensic hypnosis.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Avis Banks and her unborn child were brutally murdered. The body was discovered by her fiancé, Keyon Pittman. When police learned that Pittman was having affairs with other women, he became the prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the summer of 1986, Kathleen Lipscomb's body was found on a deserted road outside of San Antonio. Months and years passed, but the crime was never solved. Finally, a private investigator discovered Kathleen's diary.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The police investigate when a severed leg is discovered among garbage. Conventional means of identifying the victim are impossible, leading investigators to rely on DNA, forensic anthropology and toxicology.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El Chef Ramsay despierta a los Chefs restantes en medio de la noche y les ordena que preparen una cena de espaguetis para los bomberos hambrientos. Los perdedores deben lavar y encerar los camiones de bomberos.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los competidores deben crear perros calientes de proporciones perfectas para las celebridades Drew Lachey, John O'Hurley, Tom Green, Melinda Clarke, Christopher 'Kid' Reid y Kristy Swanson.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los Chefs restantes tiran los dados para determinar qué ingredientes usar para su plato de desafío. El equipo ganador gana un viaje a Las Vegas.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los Chefs restantes hacen crepes. Los ganadores cenarán en un restaurante francés mientras los perdedores se preparan para un servicio de cena con temática francesa.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los medallistas olímpicos de invierno Sasha Cohen y Jonny Moseley aparecen como jueces invitados. Para este desafío, todos los ingredientes deben provenir de Whistler, B.C.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los seis participantes restantes deben replicar los platos que les preparó el Chef Ramsay. Los ganadores cenarán con la ganadora de la cuarta temporada, Christina Machamer.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: El desafío para cada uno de los concursantes restantes es hacer un plato que se vea y sepa igual. Los expertos de la revista 'Bon Appetit' ayudan al Chef Ramsay a juzgar.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: Los participantes conocen una versión en miniatura del Chef Ramsay: el actor y chico impresionista británico Felix Light. Deben preparar comidas sin carne para él y otros ochenta jóvenes.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la primera parte del final de temporada, los tres concursantes restantes deberán preparar un plato con ingredientes de todo el mundo. Los jueces son un grupo de expertos culinarios internacionales.

programme.title: Hell’s Kitchen en español
programme.desc: En la parte final del final de temporada, los Chefs finales deben preparar platos dignos de Araxi, el restaurante y bar de ostras donde el ganador será el Chef.

programme.desc: Doce chefs compiten para impresionar a Gordon Ramsay. Ellos trabajan para abrir un renombrado restaurante en Los Ángeles. Ahí se descubre la próxima estrella culinaria.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: A wonderful, song-filled feature about an unlovable, murdered mutt (Burt Reynolds) who returns to Earth to do a good deed. When he adopts an orphan girl who can communicate with animals and help lead him to his killer.

programme.title: All Dogs Go To Heaven 2
programme.desc: Charlie and Itchy are back! Those lovable mutts from the treasured Family hit "All Dogs Go To Heaven" return for an all-new Animated Musical Adventure. Features the voices of Charlie Sheen, Dom DeLuise and Sheena Easton.

programme.title: Charlotte's Web
programme.desc: E.B. White's timeless children's story comes to life in this colorful animated musical.

programme.title: A Turtle's Tale: Sammy's Adventures
programme.desc: Dive into adventure with Sammy the sea turtle as he swims the ocean searching for the love of his life, Shelly. Based on the course of a sea turtle's life, this story of Sammy's breathtaking journey is a thrilling voyage the whole family will love!

programme.title: A Turtle's Tale 2: Sammy's Escape From Paradise
programme.desc: When Sammy and Ray find themselves trapped in The Tank, an underwater aquarium, they must hatch a plan to escape and reunite with their grandkids, Ricky and Ella, and protect them from the dangers of the ocean.

programme.title: Hatched
programme.desc: Even the smallest creatures can make a big difference in this eggs-ceptionally funny adventure!

programme.title: Ploey
programme.desc: Separated from his family, Ploey, a young flightless plover chick, must embark on a perilous journey to a legendary valley to save his family and friends from falling prey to the evil hawk.

programme.title: Swift
programme.desc: Meet Manou, a sweet bird who grows up believing he is a seagull like his parents. To his great shock, Manou discovers that he was adopted, and is actually the offspring of the much-hated swifts!

programme.title: LEGO Friends
programme.desc: Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia, and Emma enter a science contest at school and win a trip on a luxury yacht, but not everything goes as planned when they set out to sea.

programme.title: LEGO Friends
programme.desc: When the girls go to Mia’s grandparents’ ranch and Olivia accidentally knocks down the neighbor’s barn. The girls promise to raise money to rebuild it, and now have to learn to set aside their differences and work together to make good on their promise.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: It's "Hands Off Day!" a city holiday, where the entire city doesn't use their hands for anything. A nature documentary crew follows Billionaire Fendrich as if he was an animal in the wild.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Teenage superstar, Poppy Starr, visits her grandfather, Sargent Sam Grizzled. Billy and Madison lose a flying disc inside a creepy-looking house.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: The Mayor and Carol work late when all manner of strange events begin to happen. Extreme Sports host, Dynamo, holds a competition to see who will go on the City Mars mission.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Firefighter Buster Lloyd gets the opportunity to live out his fantasy of being a police officer. Sanitation worker, Shirley Keeper, educates local residents on how to take care of their City.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: It's the day of the big rocket launch, and the entire city has Mars/launch fever! Astronauts reach Mars orbit and prepare to launch their probes, but Tippy Doorman has other plans.

programme.title: LEGO City Adventures
programme.desc: Harl attempts to prevent Tippy from bringing the fabled "Mars Door" back to Earth. Tippy Dorman, faces the trial of the century after his attempt to take over the world.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: Ras attacks the Cloud Kingdom to obtain information on the Forbidden Five; Euphrasia informs the ninja and they set off to save the kingdom.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Beyond the Phantasm Cave
programme.desc: Cinder and Jordana compete for Lord Ras's favour; the ninja set out to find a teacher who can defeat the Wolf Clan; Wyldfyre sneaks on the Destiny's Bounty.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Force From the East
programme.desc: The ninjas find two old dragon masters who agree to train them. Meanwhile, Ras invades the Land of Lost Things.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: The Spell at the Waterfall
programme.desc: Egalt teaches the Rising Dragon to the ninja; Sora and Riyu learn Spinjitzu from Rontu; Cole reaches the Monastery with the Finders and sets off on an adventure with Zane.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: To Mysterium
programme.desc: Cole, Zane and Bonzle travel to Mysterium, only to fall into Dorama's trap; Arin is frustrated with his Spinjitzu training.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Fugitives From Madness
programme.desc: Zane, Bonzle and Cole meet their creator Gandalaria. Kai is appointed the third Dragon Master. The dragon masters turn into stone sculptures as the blood moon appears in the sky. The other ninja's training ends prematurely.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Dragons Rising: Secrets of the Wyldness
programme.desc: When Rontu and Egalt turn to stone, Lloyd's visions lead the ninja to Wyldness. There, the ninja seek shelter in the sorceress's warehouse. Cole and Zane fight against the administration and allow Bonzle, Sprite and Gandalaria to escape.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: The Sacred Pool in the Lion Temple has produced the biggest orb of Golden Chi ever.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Cragger angers the Gorilla tribe, and they march to the Crocodile Swamp to teach him a lesson. But the Gorilla Mechs are not fit for the swampy water, and the Lions and Eagles must come to the rescue.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Crooler has lost faith in Cragger. With the aid of the Wolves, she causes chaos at the Speedor races and tries to steal all the Chi from the Lion Temple. The mysterious Speedor rider ShadoWind shows up again — but whose side is he on?

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: The Wolves have become strong because of the stolen Chi. And now they are stealing even more. Soon all the other tribes of Chima have none. Laval and Eris must find a new, clever and “Wolf proof” way to get Chi to the tribes.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: The Wolves are still stealing Chi, and everyone else has very little. When a load of CHI falls into the Gorge of Eternal Depth, Laval, Eris and Gorzan must try to retrieve it.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Cragger and the Crocodiles taken prisoners by the Wolves. Laval determined to free his old friend. Laval, Eris, and the mysterious ShadoWind attempt a rescue.… but something about ShadoWind isn’t quite right.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Cragger has been freed and wants to give out CHI to all tribes of Chima, but he has none. He employs a strange Raven alchemist to produce some fake CHI. But the fake CHI has some very unexpected side effects, and the alchemist has an agenda of his own.

programme.title: LEGO Chima
programme.desc: Chima is peaceful yet again. Laval and Cragger go on a joyful Speedor cruise. But the Ravens use the peace to move into Eagle Spires. The Eagles try to get rid of them, but the Ravens are very persistent. It will be up to Eris to trick them to leave.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After battling off Garmadon’s Stone Army, the Ninjas finally arrive at the Temple of Light where they harness their pure elemental powers, concentrating them onto Lloyd who becomes more powerful than he ever imagined.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninjas’ attempt to return Garmadon’s ‘Helmet of Darkness’ to its perch at the Celestial Clock in order to prevent the final battle between Lloyd and his father from beginning fails, a Super Weapon is created that can destroy all of Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Garmadon uses his new Super-Weapon to turn Jamakai Village evil, he unwittingly unsettles the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possesses his body.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: A great darkness has fallen upon Ninjago as Garmadon’s Super-Weapon has turned it evil but Lloyd and the Ninjas discover that light is more powerful than dark - and the final and ultimate battle is on.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After a time of peace, the Ninja are called back into action. The spirit of the defeated Overlord has infected the electric grid of Ninjago and is using all available technology to exact his revenge on Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja go into hiding but an army of the Digtial Overlord’s evil robotic Nindroids are hunting them wherever they go.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The power is out in all of Ninjag, but the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord has disappeared. Some mysterious Stranger has stolen it and is now sending alternatively powered Nindroids to attack the Ninja and capture Lloyd.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo, con la ayuda de Gaspar, hace una lista de todas las cosas que quiere hacer antes de morir. Peluzin y el Noruego están adictos a un videojuego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se lanza como candidato a Presidente del Condominio. Sin embargo, un oponente inesperado eclipsa sus planes en plena campaña.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene problemas con el alcohol, y destruye el departamento. Peluzin descubre que va a heredar una gran cantidad de dinero y el Abuelo lo ayuda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián. Segunda parte.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego tiene un sueño de convertirse en policía. El Abuelo sufre un accidente en la regadera

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Don Sebas se casa en una isla tropical y todos viajan a la boda. Sin embargo, los descuidos del Abuelo hacen que casi se pierda el evento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar pierde su trabajo y se desconecta del mundo mientras que el Abuelo y el Noruego empiezan un negocio.

programme.title: Are you the one? el match perfecto

programme.title: La venganza de los ex

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Llega una sorpresa enorme para Potro que lo pondrá en jaque y en un triángulo amoroso en el que no esperaba estar. Y el resto de la casa sigue tenso aún con la partida de Fernando.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La costa del sol se ve conmocionada por el arribo de Karime y Labrador que se integran con todo a la fiesta de los Súper Shore, mientras tanto en la casa Arantxa y Mane le tienden una trampa a Talía, la operación pez se pone en marcha.

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When the popular writer of an advice-to-the-lovelorn column is murdered, Matlock discovers a house full of problems and suspects.

programme.desc: Ben Matlock’s nephew, Dr. Irwin Bruckner, is accused of murdering his boss, the director of a top-security think tank, and Matlock’s defense seems doomed to failure unless a master computer can be outsmarted.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock discovers he has more than one tricky suspect to contend with as he tries to defend magician Daniel Fontaine who’s accused of murdering Sandy Farrell, his ambitious and unfaithful assistant.

programme.desc: Matlock takes on the defense of Nguyen Tran, a Vietnamese fisherman accused of murdering the town bully, a man who had been terrorizing Tran and his fellow countrymen.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock’s murder defense of Allison Tate, a young heiress with a history of mental instability, is complicated by Warren Kreitzer, a New York lawyer who is responsible for her trust fund.

programme.desc: When Matlock’s neighbor, Les Calhoun, returns a malfunctioning used car he just bought, he becomes the prime suspect in the saleman's murder. Although circumstantial evidence points to a conviction, Matlock sets out to prove his new neighbor was framed.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When a British ambassador is accused by his lover, Shelby, of killing her husband, he refuses to hide behind diplomatic immunity and instead calls on Matlock to clear his name.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock suffers a series of mishaps when he tries to find a missing murder witness to clear his client, who’s accused of killing her philandering husband.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock must overcome his dislike of a caustic radio personality and defend him when he is accused of killing a rival disk jockey.

programme.title: Matlock

programme.title: Matlock

programme.desc: Midsomer comes closer to its boiling point when a priest is burned to death inside the effigy of a straw woman and more people burst into flames spontaneously, as though by witchcraft.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Nine years after Ferdy Villers killed himself, his family reunites for Christmas, unaware that someone is out for revenge.

programme.desc: Undertaker Patrick Pennyman is found dead with his wrists slashed and suspicion turns towards a spiritualist church.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: During a regatta, the body of Rowing Club chairman Guy Sweetman is found bludgeoned and drowned. Bachelor Sweetman was prolifically promiscuous so jealousy would seem to be the motive.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik takes on a penthouse listing where the owners have overspent; Steve hustles to sell his ex-girlfriend's apartment and her next-door neighbor's unit in record time; Ryan has to sell out a Brooklyn building for a first-time developer.

programme.desc: Fredrik takes on 50 Cent's Connecticut estate listing and throws an epic broker's open to entice buyers; Ryan has a chance at the biggest listing of his career but only if he can get to Shanghai in time; Steve takes on a stale penthouse listing.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan hits a speed bump in his attempt to get to Shanghai with $1 billion in business on the line; Fredrik's tensions with his co-lister put a potential deal in jeopardy; Steve gets a chance to work for a dream client.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: When a deal falls through, Steve's solution for getting the unit sold may end up draining his bank account; Fredrik launches a NoHo development with a creative but risky marketing campaign; Ryan mentors a young broker on a townhouse listing.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan's caught in a tricky situation when selling a team member's Tribeca home; Steve gets his first shot at selling an entire building; Fredrik tries to sell an overpriced penthouse while mentoring a co-lister who wants a spot on his team.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik lists an infamous Chelsea townhouse with a seller whose reputation for firing brokers precedes her; Ryan entrusts a Park Slope listing to a brand new agent with unorthodox methods; Steve tries a change in strategy with the Circa building.

programme.desc: Steve's world is turned upside down when his brokerage shutters without warning, leaving the Gold Group without a home; Fredrik markets beachfront villas in St. Lucia; Ryan and Emilia search for a dream home while discussing expanding their family.

programme.desc: Ryan searches for the perfect townhouse for a bickering couple; Steve is under pressure to choose a new brokerage; Steve and Fredrik travel to St. Lucia to pitch buyers on ocean-side villas; Steve is forced to make a career-changing decision.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan tries to win back a billion dollar development by throwing an event; Steve is anxious to prove himself as he battles the elements to sell a penthouse; Fredrik takes on a stunning new building and is pressured to make a major celebrity sale.

programme.desc: Steve tries to find a buyer for a charming country home on a piece of land in Upstate New York; Ryan has two weeks to work his magic on a skyscraper; Fredrik tries to impress his clients by selling an apartment to actor Bruce Willis.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan pitches his brand new seven-story Chelsea townhouse as a smart-home paradise for tech enthusiasts; Luis and Ronita explore the idea of reuniting; Fredrik's former assistant, Jordan, invites him to help close the deal on a new listing in Tribeca.

programme.desc: Dean Stockwell guest stars as Gunnar Malstrom, one of the leaders of Pendulum -- a secret terrorist organization -- who has a plan involving a major attack on the government that the Impossible Missions Force is assigned to uncover.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Ed Nelson guest stars as Van Cleve, a brilliant thief who is convinced by the IMF that he has the power of precognition as part of its plan to recover the more than five million dollars worth of art treasures that he has stolen.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Singer Barbara McNair guest stars as Jena Cole, the beautiful leader of a band of jewel thieves who falls in love with Barney who himself has infiltrated her operation to recover the stolen crown jewels of a foreign nation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force, led by Jim Phelps (Peter Graves) enters Equatorial Africa to crush an army of mercenaries, led by a self-styled colonel, and to return plundered gold to its rightful owners.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Cinnamon poses as a 50-year-old blind princess, heiress to a Balkan kingdom.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Guest star Fernando Lamas portrays a diplomat-playboy who romances another diplomat's wife, played by Lee Grant.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force is assigned to knock out a boxing syndicate which fixes fights to create favorable odds for a bookmaking operation, in the first half of a two-part story.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Barney poses as a fighter making his comeback, who boxes his way to a title bout with Staczek (Robert Phillips) in the second half of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Not knowing when, where, or how a dangerous adversary will strike, Jim Phelps and Cinnamon use themselves as human quarries.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: With Phelps and Rollin as the leading men, the Impossible Missions Force stages an anti-American play which could prove to be a strong propaganda device for the enemy.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: An army commander (played by guest star Theodore Bikel) plots to become dictator by imprisoning an influential cardinal and using a look-alike actor for a public endorsement.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The Impossible Missions Force offers a "fountain of youth" to the vain and dictatorial widow (guest star Ruth Roman) of the late president of a small South American country in order to depose her.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Cinnamon is captured and the enemy discovers the one thing that would unmask her identity and expose the Impossible Mission Force.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a raincoat and talks about things to do inside. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Lady Aberlin dances in the rain. X flies to slide down a rainbow. Daniel wants to learn Tai Chi to stop his scary dreams.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers hangs a fish mobile, then goes to see some killer whales swim and play. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Lady Elaine teaches dance and says males weren't invited to the studio because they don't dance.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Sam Weber and sees him dance. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday XIII goes to Lady Elaine's dance school, and she turns him away claiming that men can't dance. Sam Weber arrives and dances.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers helps to weave a scarf. Henrietta Pussycat's ballet teacher, Miss Cloud, does not speak but communicates with movement. The Junior Tamburitzans perform two folk dances. Mister Rogers talks about making up stories and dances.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers, with the help of his ventriloquist dummy, learns that sign language and talking can be two different ways of saying the same thing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of children's television programs from around the world. Queen Sara Saturday and Mayor Maggie prepare for their job switch. Nancy Caterpillar is anxious to transition into being a butterfly.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a dog. Bob Trow stops by with the Bob Dog costume. Prince Tuesday fears that the change will be permanent. Neighbor Aber arrives to explain that the switch is just temporary.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a clown mask. "Mayor" Sara prepares a speech as two lost clowns arrive. To help the clowns find their way to the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Queen Sara suggests that she and Mayor Maggie trade jobs.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Nancy Caterpillar sees herself in a mirror and realizes that she is very special the way she is. She turns into a butterfly. Mister Rogers visits the circus and sees Jeff Gabel apply his clown make-up.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows pictures of the night and day skies. He plays with a star on a string and then remembers his trip to Moscow, where he met Russian children's television program producers. There is a pretend star falling from a string.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers has some scuba diving equipment and imagines what a real scuba diver would see in the ocean. Some of the neighbors are frightened by Chuck Aber and Betty Okonak Templeton Jones in their scuba diving gear.

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: El Sr. Cangrejo debe aprender a ser más generoso si quiere evitar que el Holandés Errante lo lance en el casillero de Davy Jones; Bob Esponja decide quedarse en casa para siempre.

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: Bob Esponja
programme.desc: Bob Esponja se ofrece como salvavidas. Además, Plankton inventa una máquina que le permite cambiar de vida con don Cangrejo.

programme.title: Bob Esponja

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: As the girls continue to have problems accommodating Charlotte as a mermaid, Nate bullies Lewis. Despite the girls’ attempts to keep Charlotte under control, she uses her powers on Nate and almost exposes them all.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Charlotte takes over and organises a surprise party for Lewis, annoying Rikki. At the party, Charlotte is jealous of Cleo and traps her and Emma in a pool room. Rikki comes back just in time. From now on, Charlotte is on her own.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: Cleo is bullied by Charlotte and runs away to the ocean. With Cleo missing, everyone becomes more and more worried. Lewis discovers what Charlotte has been up to and breaks up with her. He finds Cleo and they kiss.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water
programme.desc: The full moon rises, and with the planets lining up, it can remove mermaid powers for good. Knowing this, Lewis lures Charlotte to the moon pool but it backfires and Emma, Cleo and Rikki all look set to lose their powers.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: The Awakening
programme.desc: Cleo and Rikki face their final year of high school without Emma. They make a new friend in Bella and meet new boy Will – and encounter a strange new force on Mako Island that turns water against them.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Jungle Hunt
programme.desc: Will seeks confirmation of his first experience on Mako Island. Bella volunteers to misdirect his search so he won't find the Moon Pool. The girls and Lewis discover the Moon Pool has changed.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Keep Your Enemies Close
programme.desc: Cleo seeks a new job as an assistant dolphin trainer at the Marine Park. Rikki fires Nate's band from playing at the cafe until she and Bella reach an understanding.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: Cleo is forced to put Lewis' plans for romance on hold to restrain Kim's out-of-control love life. During this time, Don meets Samantha, a National Parks manager, and they start dating.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Big Ideas
programme.desc: Zane concocts a dirt bike race to publicize the café. When Rikki discovers it's a scam, she and Bella decide to teach him and Nate a lesson. Cleo and Lewis make a major discovery about mixing the waters in the Moon Pool.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Bella attempts to start a relationship with Will until she sees he's apparently got another girl. Lewis tests the magic Moon Pool water at school and attracts the attention of their Science teacher.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Happy Families
programme.desc: A problematic family beach picnic leads Don to end his relationship with Samantha, until Cleo encourages him to pursue it. Will's sister, Sophie, competes with Bella for a job at the café and sets her sights on Zane.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Kidnapped
programme.desc: Rikki and Bella hide out at Cleo's to protect themselves from a full moon water attack. However, Bella is kidnapped by a water tentacle and taken to Mako Island. Lewis tries to keep Will away from the island so the girls can rescue her.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: The Sorcerer's Apprentice
programme.desc: Cleo defies Lewis' advice and experiments with the magic Moon Pool water. Using her powers, Rikki accidentally gets the water into Cleo's aquarium and all the girls have to rescue Cleo's fish Hector.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Revealed
programme.desc: Bella's warned to back off from Will as he's on the trail of the girls' mermaid secrets. She gets too close to him and he finally discovers she's a mermaid.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Just a Girl at Heart
programme.desc: Bella helps Will with his free-diving training but when she realises he's more interested in her as a mermaid than a girl, she's hurt. Rikki and Cleo have to improvise when the cafe's first corporate function is actually a children's party.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Rikki receives counterfeit money at the café and is held captive by criminals on a boat. Bella and Cleo are forced to reveal the trio's secret to Will, so they can rescue Rikki together.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: To Have and to Hold Back
programme.desc: Kim attempts to derail Don and Samantha's wedding. Lewis receives an opportunity to study in America. Cleo realises she's got to let Lewis live his own life and let him go overseas.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Mermaid Magic
programme.desc: Will pushes himself too far when Zane challenges him to prove his skills as a free-diver. The girls discover a unique crystal in the rock from the Moon Pool.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Power Play
programme.desc: Sophie uses Bella's idea for a fundraising concert and presents it as her own to Rikki to gain publicity for the café. Cleo's caught in the crossfire with Kim when Samantha moves in and puts her stamp on the Sertori home.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: The Dark Side
programme.desc: Rikki's frustrated by the water attacks and goes to Mako Island on a full moon to confront the strange force in the Moon Pool. With Cleo and Bella delayed, Will pursues her and discovers she's been affected by the experience.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: A Magnetic Attraction
programme.desc: Cleo's introduced to Ryan, a young geophysicist who's working for Samantha. Rikki doesn't react well to Cleo consulting Ryan about the Mako rock and a fracture begins to appear in the trio.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Into the Light
programme.desc: Rikki fears Ryan's explorations on Mako Island will uncover their secrets but Cleo and Bella discount her concern. She almost goes too far trying to stop Ryan from discovering the crystals in the Moon Pool.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Breakaway
programme.desc: Will competes in the Free-Diving Championships but afterward chooses to break from the sport and shrug off Sophie's influence on his life. Rikki sees Sophie kissing Zane at the event and breaks off their relationship.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Queen for a Day
programme.desc: Zane installs Sophie as head of staff at the café. Bella develops a sneezing allergy that also accidentally triggers her powers. Sophie seizes on the problem and looks to fire Bella and the band.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: The Jewel Thief
programme.desc: The girls discover the Mako crystals contain immense energy and need to mount a rescue mission when Zane jealously steals one in an effort to gain Rikki's attention.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Mako Masters
programme.desc: The girls sit their final school exams and have to avoid a water attack in public when the full moon rises early. They confront the water force in the Moon Pool and are given a message about Mako Island.

programme.title: H2O: Just Add Water: Beach Party
programme.desc: Bella's eager to ask Will to the end of year party until she sees him asking Rikki. A big misunderstanding occurs, which prompts Will to express his true feelings for Bella. Sophie tries to get Zane to change the name of the café.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Arvonda says her fiance can't satisfy her and treats her badly. She'll tell him that she's been sleeping with his best friend, Mike! Next, Teresa has no idea her boyfriend is having an ongoing affair!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: "Psychic Lover" is a phony psychic who convinces women that their boyfriends are cheating so that he can then start having affairs with them. Later Marcus cheated on his girlfriend, Latoria, with her mother!

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show
programme.desc: Beba is here to confront her cousin for stealing her man. Next Tiffany thinks she is going to marry Brian today but there's a catch. Then Billie may have introduced her longtime love, Arkim, to Tiffanie, but today she wants him for herself.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Jerry Springer

programme.title: El show de Maury

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team investigates the disappearance of a grieving woman and tries to determine whether or not she went missing while trying to rescue her son in Central America.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team members search for a woman who disappeared after the police killed her boyfriend. They wonder if the missing woman's brother, a drug dealer and violent gang leader, is connected to the abduction.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: When an ultimate fighter disappears after winning a match, the team discovers he knew a lot of people that could have been responsible for his abduction. One suspect is a childhood enemy who was recently released from prison.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: When an ex-con who has recently been released from prison goes missing, the team questions whether her past mistakes, including embezzling money, may have come back to haunt her.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: A college student -- and former child prodigy -- receives a death threat and subsequently disappears while working in a mall as a department store Santa. The team tries to determine whether the student had been using his genius for criminal endeavors.

programme.title: Without A Trace
programme.desc: The team attempts to locate Scott Lucas, a private investigator who has gone missing while doing undercover surveillance. Due to Lucas's line of work and reputation for getting the job done, the list of suspects is long.

programme.title: Killing Them Softly
programme.desc: During the economic turmoil of 2008, Jackie Cogan (Brad Pitt), an enforcer, is hired to restore order after three idiots rob a mob-protected poker game.

programme.desc: A proud movie theater owner must defend his family business from corporate developers alongside a legendary action star as art imitates life in a showdown for the ages.

programme.desc: Something is killing off townsfolk in Tarker's Mills. Something ingenious. Something remotely human. But the only person in town with courage to stop this lurking menace is a 13-year-old boy, confined to a wheelchair since birth.

programme.title: Stephen King's Graveyard Shift
programme.desc: When a mill is reopened, several employees meet their deaths. The killings all occur between 11 p.m. and 7 a.m. the Graveyard Shift. Soon, the workers find a maze of tunnels leading to the cemetery and the horror that comes alive at night.

programme.title: Stephen King's Thinner
programme.desc: An obese attorney accidentally runs down and kills an old gypsy woman. After her ancient father puts a curse on him, he starts losing weight, and cannot stop. Based on the Stephen King novel, written under the pseudonym Richard Bachman.

programme.title: Pet Sematary Two
programme.desc: Antagonized by the neighbourhood kids, Jeff befriends outsider, Drew Gilbert, who lives in fear of his cruel stepfather Gus. After Gus shoots Drew's beloved dog, the boys bury the body in a place rumoured to have powers of resurrection.

programme.title: The Return of Swamp Thing

programme.title: Maximum Overdrive
programme.desc: After a mysterious comet turns every machine on Earth into a homicidal rampage device, the survivors at the Dixie Boy Truck Stop are making a stand, and human vengeance goes into overdrive.

programme.title: The Dead Zone
programme.desc: A man awakens from a coma to discover he has a psychic detective ability.

programme.title: First Reformed
programme.desc: The pastor (Ethan Hawke) of a small church in upstate New York spirals out of control after a soul-shaking encounter with an unstable environmental activist and his pregnant wife (Amanda Seyfried) in this taut, chilling thriller.

programme.title: The Souvenir: Part II
programme.desc: A moving and vibrantly funny story of young adulthood and young love, The Souvenir Part II follows an ambitious film student in 1980s London through an intoxicating world of unpredictable and romantic entanglements.

programme.title: C'mon C'mon
programme.desc: Johnny and his young nephew forge a tenuous but transformational relationship when they are unexpectedly thrown together in this delicate and deeply moving story about the connections between adults and children, the past and the future.

programme.title: The Humans
programme.desc: Based on the Tony Award-winning play, a family gathers for Thanksgiving in their daughter's apartment. Amidst the warmth and humor of the holiday, the tight-knit family tries to hold together in the face of an anxious and uncertain future.

programme.title: The End of the Tour
programme.desc: A funny and touching exploration of fame, success, and friendship as we follow journalist David Lipsky (Jesse Eisenberg) during five days he spent on the road interviewing renowned and reclusive novelist David Foster Wallace (Jason Segel).

programme.title: The Last Movie Star
programme.desc: Burt Reynolds stars as an aging screen icon who gets lured into accepting an award at a rinky-dink film festival in Nashville, launching him on both a hilarious fish-out-of-water adventure and an unexpectedly poignant journey into his past.

programme.title: My Week With Marilyn

programme.desc: A female pirate and her companion race against their rivals to find a hidden island that contains a fabulous treasure.

programme.desc: Tintin and his friends discover directions to a sunken ship commanded by Capt. Haddock's ancestor and go off on a treasure hunt.

programme.title: Simply Ming
programme.desc: Ken Oringer joins Ming to work with a New England staple -- fresh oysters from off the shores of Massachusetts. Ken makes a mouthwatering Thai Sausage with Oyster Aioli and Ming rivals that with Butter Poached Oysters with Lapchong Salsa.

programme.title: Simply Ming

programme.title: Project Fire: Chino-Latino

programme.title: Project Fire: Miami Spice
programme.desc: Celebrate the vibrant food culture of Miami with dishes like Cuban-style pork, grilled plantains, and Miami-style grilled seafood.

programme.title: Project Fire: Wine Country Grill
programme.desc: Discover the flavors of California's wine country with grapevine-grilled chicken breasts and wine-marinated flank steak. Steven Raichlen showcases how wine pairs perfectly with grilled foods.

programme.title: World's Weirdest Restaurants

programme.title: World's Weirdest Restaurants
programme.desc: Burgers and ribs at Dick's Last Resort, Ciabot in Italy served in a barn, and Heart Attack Grill.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Napa, CA - Marooned in San Francisco, Tony tastes local shellfish and durian ice cream before embarking on a pilgrimage to experience the genius of Thomas Keller, chef, and owner of The French Laundry.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: New York, NY - Passionate about his city, Tony gives us an intimate tour of the New York City foods he loves - sturgeon and bagels, fluke ceviche, pan-seared foie gras, braised veal cheek, authentic cheese and, of course, a hotdog.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: New York, NY Provincetown, MA - Experience the formative moments of Tony's career as he revisits his first job, the culinary institute that taught him the basics, a normal workday at Les Halles Brasserie, and his mysterious mentor, Bigfoot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: Scotland - Beginning in Glasgow, Tony experiences the heart-clogging glory of deep-fried pizza, deep-fried mars bars, and deep-fried pickled eggs! Moving on to more traditional fare, Tony tastes haggis and learns to hunt and fish for his food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain A Cook's Tour
programme.desc: London, England - In London, Tony attempts to dispel the myth that all English food is disgusting and over-boiled. Tony tries Nose to Tail Eating, explores traditional fare at Pie and Mash Shoppes, and then visits a predominantly Indian community.

programme.title: JFK: The Ultimate Conspiracy
programme.desc: It was one of the darkest days in American history and the most horrifying public events of the 20th century. Decades later...Kennedy's assassination, is still a global mystery that affects the world to this date.

programme.title: Killing John F. Kennedy
programme.desc: Who would kill one of the most popular presidents? Why is he a target? Join us as we investigate the life and career of JFK and ask the question: Who was really behind the killing of JFK?

programme.title: JFK's Women: The Scandals Revealed
programme.desc: John F. Kennedy, the charismatic president. However, with all that charm came a hidden life of reckless sexual adventure. He had a confirmed affair with Marilyn Monroe, and at least five of his endeavors posed a potential threat to national security.

programme.title: JFK: The Smoking Gun
programme.desc: Veteran Police Detective Colin McLaren spent four years on the forensic cold-case investigation of JFK's assassination. What he had, and other investigators did not, was modern technology and access to all the evidence, facts and eyewitness testimony.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad
programme.desc: A golden apple inscribed 'for the fairest' is sent to a feast at Olympus. Unable to decide between the goddesses Aphrodite, Hera and Athena, Zeus decides to let a mortal choose.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad
programme.desc: All of the Greek kings and their armies have responded to Agamemnon's call... All except two, that is: Odysseus, and Achilles.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad
programme.desc: Ten years have passed since the Greek forces arrived in Troy, but King Priam's city has still not fallen. The king's eldest son, Hector, reproaches his brother Paris for causing this war with no end.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad
programme.desc: Agamemnon has seen it in a dream: Troy will be taken today. Helen's husband Menelaus recognizes Paris, the man who took his wife. The two men decide to face each other in a duel.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad
programme.desc: The chaos that reigns between Greeks and Trojans has now spread to Mount Olympus. Back on the battlefield, the Trojans have driven back the Greeks, and decide to build a long wall.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad
programme.desc: Odysseus and Ajax try to convince Achilles to return to combat, but the Greek warrior rejects their appeals. On the battlefield, Agamemnon, Diomedes and even Odysseus are injured one after the other.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad
programme.desc: Saved by Apollo, Hector goes back on the attack and leads the Trojans as far as the Greeks' ships. Patroclus, a childhood friend of Achilles, rushes to him and implores him to re-join the battle.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad
programme.desc: Thetis asks Hephaestus, the god of blacksmiths to forge new armour and weapons for her son Achilles. At dawn, she hands them to him, knowing that they will lead to his death.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad
programme.desc: The River Scamander and its banks are set alight by fireballs sent by the god Hephaestus. The river god spares Achilles, who immediately goes back on the rampage. The gods are shocked by his rage.

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Iliad

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey

programme.title: Great Greek Myths: The Odyssey

programme.title: Juana la Virgen

programme.title: Juana la Virgen
programme.desc: Juana perdona a Micky por lo que hizo contra ella. Mauricio le confiesa a Desireé que hay una mujer que está esperando un hijo suyo pero teme que ella lo delate ante Carlota.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Suena la marcha nupcial y Sara entra a la iglesia para unirse a Cristóbal. La ceremonia se está realizando, cuando el primero en interrumpir la boda es el que al final es el más sorprendido. Los invitados son testigos de la fuerza del verdadero amor.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: A Marisa Luján no le tiemblan las piernas para entrar a la iglesia y develar frente a todos los secretos que Sara intenta mantener ocultos. Son muchas las voces que se suman a la de Marisa para poder desenmascarar todos los engaños de la novia.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Cristóbal le suplica a Marisa que lo perdone, tratando de convencerla de rehacer sus vidas, dejando a un lado el orgullo y el dolor de sus heridas. Sara huye con su principal cómplice, mientras las unidades de la policía se activan en Queens.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Amelia reconoce cual es la mujer que tiene el empuje, el valor y el corazón necesarios para acompañar a su hijo. A Marisa le hará falta más que esa fortaleza para enfrentar la venganza que está planeando Sara. Cristóbal recibe una visita inesperada.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Sara Montero planifica más que un secuestro para lucirse con su maldad y ejecutar la peor tortura para Marisa. La sed de venganza de Estanislao toma el control de la situación, cuando llegan a un escondite en el que creen que no podrán ser encontrados.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Marisa vive con angustia, a la espera de la llamada de los secuestradores para exigir sus condiciones. A pesar de seguir las coordenadas, la policía no se espera los planes de Estanislao. Pero aparece alguien con la clave para el rescate.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: No solo la policía llega al escondite de Sara Montiel, donde comienza un enfrentamiento feroz, y el rescate de Lalo se convierte en un duelo a muerte entre Calixta y el Polaco. El plan de Cristóbal no será suficiente para liberar al hijo de Marisa.

programme.title: Una maid en Manhattan
programme.desc: Sara, desesperada por acabar con su enemiga, tendrá el destino que jamás imaginó. El camino queda libre para llevar adelante los proyectos prometidos en la campaña del senador Parker y, en especial, el que unirá para siempre a Marisa y a Cristóbal.

programme.title: Marido en alquiler

programme.desc: We get a Pacific Rim rush when we visit energetic, ever-changing Hong Kong. On a famous Star Ferry, Rudy savors one of the most majestic skylines on earth.

programme.title: Smart Travels with Rudy Maxa
programme.desc: London, Paris, Amsterdam, and Brussels. A European city bustles-it's a hub of commerce and the arts, energy, surprise, and international flavor. Where do you start if you have just 24-hours?

programme.title: Rick Steves' Europe: Assisi and Italian Country Charm
programme.desc: In the Italian countryside, we'll see how prosciutto and pecorino are made, duck into ancient wine cellars, and visit the hill town of Assisi — and its awe-inspiring basilica.

programme.title: Rick Steves' Europe
programme.desc: As we ramble through the heart of Rome, we'll admire breathtaking Bernini statues and ponder sunbeams inside St. Peter's Basilica. After dinner, we'll take a nighttime stroll, lacing together the city's piazzas and fountains.

programme.title: Rick Steves' Europe: Siena and Tuscany's Wine Country
programme.desc: We'll enjoy a front-row seat at Siena's wild Palio horse race and marvel at treasures from the city's golden age, then head out of town for a taste of Tuscan dolce vita.

programme.title: Rick Steves' Europe
programme.desc: We enjoy Renaissance art in Florence, the city that propelled Europe out of the Middle Ages. Then we visit two cultural capitals in their own right: Pisa, where we'll marvel at a tipsy tower; and Lucca, where we'll celebrate Puccini.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Israel Museum, Jerusalem

programme.desc: From the mystery of a Pharaoh’s gold to the strange practice of animal mummification, discover the secrets inside the Egyptian Museum.

programme.title: Museum Secrets: Inside the Uffizi Gallery, Florence

programme.desc: Ash has an eventful homecoming with a surprise visit from an old friend, a visit to see Professor Oak, and a Team Rocket raid. There’s no place like home!

programme.title: Pokemon: Adventures in the Orange Islands: A Rivalry Revival
programme.desc: After Gary comes to the rescue against Team Rocket, Ash seizes an opportunity…at long last, our hero gets to challenge his rival to their very first Pokémon battle!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Ash begins his journey in Johto, a region largely unexplored and populated with Pokémon entirely new to him and his friends.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: On the road again, Ash and his Charizard soundly defeat an ambitious rookie Trainer named Casey. Upset, she runs away before Ash can comfort her—the perfect time for Team Rocket to strike!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: In a forest that's being destroyed by rampaging Pinsir, Ash has to enlist the help of the local Heracross to protect their home! But it turns out these Pokémon look tougher than they act…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: On their way to Violet City, our heroes arrive in a valley where Donphan are used to harvest precious stones. Needless to say, the Team Rocket villains aren't far behind them!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: The forest can be a scary place at night, especially when you’re lost! Our heroes will need some help to get out of this mess. It's Hoothoot to the rescue!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: On their first stop in a city since New Bark Town, our heroes decide to help an insecure Bellossom dance troupe regain their confidence and perform in an upcoming exhibition!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Ash and the gang arrive in a town besieged by apparent copycat crimes mimicking a legendary master thief. The town’s hopes lie with these young Trainers...how can they stop this criminal duo and their Meowth accomplice?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: When our heroes return an unhappy Snubbull to its wealthy Trainer, it sparks off a series of events that will change the Pokémon’s life forever!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: When Brock discovers a hurt and frightened Stantler in a nearby park, he decides to nurse it back to health. But with Jessie, James and Meowth on his case, can he keep Stantler safe?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Still on the road to Violet City, Ash encounters a wild Chikorita and tries to catch it. Chikorita proves to be a tougher opponent than he originally thought, and things only get worse when Team Rocket arrives…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Professor Oak’s errand to deliver the mysterious GS Ball to a Poké Ball expert is interrupted when a Quagsire with an eye for round objects steals the GS Ball for a nocturnal ritual…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Under yet another Team Rocket ambush, a young Trainer and her Ledyba help our heroes see them off. But, amidst the chaos, her Ledyba get separated from the group—where could they be?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Our heroes make a rest stop in a Pokémon Center, which is run by a kind-hearted but misguided Blissey. Things only get worse when an old friend of Blissey's drops in unexpectedly…

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Finally reaching Violet City, Ash’s search for the Gym is halted by a trip to the local Pokémon Academy. Ash does well playing teacher, until one pupil takes off with Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: It’s finally time for Ash’s first Johto League Gym battle, and he’s feeling confident. But Falkner’s Flying-type Pokémon prove to be tough competition! Can Ash take the win—and his first Gym badge?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Back on the road after his first Johto Gym badge win, Ash and the gang find a cute Marill that won’t stop crying! Nothing our heroes try will stop it, and a Team Rocket raid certainly won’t help!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Team Rocket’s latest invention is bound to be a hit...until Togepi and its newfound Sentret friend take it out for a spin!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Ash hears of a training ground for wild Charizard and decides it's just the place to hone his own Charizard’s strength. But the tough lessons to be learned there will change Ash and Charizard’s friendship forever!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Back on the road to the Azalea Gym, our heroes discover a Sunflora festival in a nearby town and meet a Trainer whose Sunflora is too sad to compete. Can Ash and the gang put a smile on its face?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Ash is having a hard time getting his Chikorita to listen to him, and Nurse Joy thinks that it’s due to a bout of jealousy over Ash’s friendship with Pikachu! Can Ash prove how much Chikorita means to him?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys
programme.desc: Our heroes meet a Trainer whose Hoppip partners can predict the weather. But on the horizon, there are two storms approaching...and one of them goes by the name 'Team Rocket'!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: The Superhero Secret
programme.desc: The legendary superhero Gligarman grows old and is beginning to consider hanging up his cape. When Ash and friends wander into town, they bring with them a challenge that could be his final fight: Team Rocket!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Mild ‘N Wooly
programme.desc: When an unruly herd of Mareep ruin their lunch plans, our heroes decide to help their timid herder in time to compete in a local battle festival.

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Wired For Battle
programme.desc: When the top student at a Pokémon training center loses interest in Pokémon battles, opting to build a comprehensive Pokémon database instead, it’s up to Ash to convince him that battling is not just about probability!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Good ‘Quil Hunting
programme.desc: When Ash finds a Cyndaquil in the wild, he is eager to catch it...but you can bet he’s not the only one!

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: A Shadow Of A Drought
programme.desc: Arriving in Azalea Town, Ash carelessly provokes its residents, who adore SlowPoké. And things only look worse as Team Rocket arrives, meaning to snag every last SlowPoké! What can Ash do?

programme.title: Pokemon: The Johto Journeys: Going Apricorn

programme.desc: Ash has finally reached the Azalea Gym, but Cyndaquil isn’t quite fired up enough to take on the Gym Leader. As the battle heats up, Ash has to give his all to take on the powerful Bug-type Pokémon!
